description.content: Card authorization and fund verification
Authorize a card transaction to verify funds availability and place a hold on the cardholder's credit line. Returns an authorization code that must be captured to complete the transaction.

Process an authorization and capture in a single step. Use for transactions where you want to immediately settle funds without a separate capture step.

Refunds and credits to cardholder accounts
Issue a refund to a cardholder. Can be a full or partial refund of a previously captured transaction, or an unlinked credit to any card.

Cancel pending unsettled transactions
Cancel a pending transaction before it is settled. Can void authorizations, captures, sales, and credits that have not yet been settled.

Card data tokenization via Vantiv Vault
Tokenize a payment card number into a secure token via the Vantiv Vault. The token can be used for subsequent transactions without storing raw card data, reducing PCI scope.

The Vantiv Card Not Present (CNP) API (formerly the Litle eCommerce API) enables online and mobile payment processing. The API supports card authorizations, sales, captures, credits, voids, tokenization via eProtect/Vault, recurring billing, and chargeback management. Communication occurs via HTTPS POST with XML payloads. Vantiv merged with Worldpay in 2018 and the service is now offered as Worldpay from FIS.
